meta.race_name: Best Odds Guaranteed Overnight At CopyBet Novices' Limited Handicap Hurdle

rankings.name: Carlton
key_positive_factors: Top-rated contender with an Official Rating of 93
Extremely consistent form profile (137323) with multiple podium finishes in this class
James Owen yard is in excellent form and booking Thomas Bellamy is a major plus
RPR and TS trends indicate a horse at the peak of its powers for this level
key_risks: Market leader status means there is limited betting value at early odds
High weight burden compared to lower-rated rivals in the handicap

rankings.name: Pottersmattyeeehaa
key_positive_factors: Highly consistent recent string (335432) suggesting a win is imminent
Strong Official Rating (90) puts them right in the mix
Jockey J M Quinlan has a good rapport with the horse
Strong Top Speed (TS) figures relative to the field
key_risks: Often finds one or two too good in the closing stages
Needs everything to go right to finally break through

rankings.name: Ocean Walz
key_positive_factors: Encouraging 2nd place finish in latest outing suggests returning to form
High handicap mark (OR 90) indicates significant latent ability
Suited by the 'Good to Soft' conditions
key_risks: Previous form (280-68) shows high levels of inconsistency
Can be prone to jumping errors when under pressure

rankings.name: For Old Times Sake
key_positive_factors: Neil Mulholland is a respected trainer capable of targeting these events
Significant drop in class or favorable handicap mark (OR 89)
Showed early season promise with a 2nd place finish
key_risks: Form has dipped significantly in recent starts (8786)
Needs to prove they have regained their early-season spark

rankings.name: Different Drum
key_positive_factors: Improving profile with a solid 6th last time out in a tougher race
Jamie Hamilton is a strong tactical jockey choice
key_risks: Still relatively unexposed at this distance and class
Limited evidence of winning potential based on form (956)

rankings.name: Huckleberry Sting
key_positive_factors: Winner three starts ago, proving they can handle the class
Significantly lower weight (OR 75) than the top-rated horses
key_risks: Highly erratic form (0F/1-7) including a Fall and a Tailed Off finish
Data warnings suggest inconsistency across different reporting sources

rankings.name: Saccary
key_positive_factors: Christian Williams is a shrewd trainer who can find improvement
Handicap mark (OR 76) is becoming attractive
key_risks: Recent form (58-467) shows a downward trajectory in performance

rankings.name: Lawsky
key_positive_factors: Low handicap mark (OR 72) offers a weight advantage
James Owen yard has a second string that shouldn't be ignored
key_risks: Form is poor (00/45P) and was Pulled Up in the latest start

rankings.name: Global Eclipse
key_positive_factors: Has shown some ability in the past with a 2nd place finish
key_risks: Coming off a long layoff (form ends with '-')
Market price suggests a lack of confidence from the yard

rankings.name: Golly Gosh
key_positive_factors: Tom Cannon is one of the more experienced jockeys in the race
key_risks: Consistently well-beaten in recent starts (0-767)

rankings.name: Le Beau Gosse
key_positive_factors: Established stable of O Greenall & J Guerriero
key_risks: Abysmal recent form (P5864P) including multiple Pulled Up results

rankings.name: Hairy Potter
key_positive_factors: High Official Rating (90) suggests significant latent ability if recaptured
key_risks: Long string of poor results (57-8657) without a single placing

rankings.name: Edna E Mode
key_positive_factors: Handicap mark (OR 87) is falling to a competitive level
key_risks: Recent form (452-48) shows little signs of life

rankings.name: Dusky Spyglass
key_positive_factors: Trainer Mike Murphy can occasionally cause an upset
key_risks: Tailed off or Pulled Up in almost every career start

pace_analysis.insight: Pottersmattyeeehaa's strong top speed figures suggest they will set a moderate tempo, favoring the highly consistent and top-rated Carlton.
